chapter_title.en: Reports of those who saw the Imam of the Time (a.s)

text: 231- وبهذا الاسناد، عن خادم لإبراهيم بن عبدة النيسابوري قال: كنت واقفا مع إبراهيم على الصفا فجاء غلام حتى وقف على إبراهيم وقبض على كتاب مناسكه وحدثه بأشياء.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 231 - It is narrated from the same chains from the servant of Ibrahim bin Abda Nishapuri that he said: “I was standing with Ibrahim on Safa Mountain when a youth came and stood over Ibrahim. He took hold of his book of rituals of Hajj and told him about some matters.”
